summary: Update information of a Budget Change
description: Update information of a Budget Change

id.description: Unique identifier of this budget change

description.description: Description of budget change in HTML format

type.description:
Used to identify type of line item. id uniqueness is guaranteed per type

NOTE: To update an Adjustment Line Item with the type budget_change for an adjustment_number, an Adjustment Line item with ...

ref.description: Identifier used to map line items in the request to their respective objects or errors in the response

change_event_line_item_id.description: ID for the change event line item associated with the adjustment

_delete.description: Whether this adjustment should be deleted

prostore_file_ids.description: The desired prostore file identifiers that will replace the current collection of attachments associated with the budget change

production_quantities.description: List of budget change production quantities

ref.description: Identifier used to map production quantities in the request to their respective objects or errors in the response

change_event_production_quantity_id.description: ID of the Change Event Production Quantity that is to be associated with the Budget Change Production Quantity

_delete.description: Whether this production quantity should be deleted
